name: das-tgfw-v6
description: OctoBus package for DAS TGFW V6 blacklist query, add, and delete APIs.

DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/query_blacklist.name: query-blacklist
DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/query_blacklist.description: Query DAS TGFW V6 blacklist records.

DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/add_blacklist.name: add-blacklist
DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/add_blacklist.description: Add a DAS TGFW V6 blacklist record.

DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/delete_blacklist.name: delete-blacklist
DAS_TGFW_V6.DAS_TGFW_V6/delete_blacklist.description: Delete a DAS TGFW V6 blacklist record.
